boundaries: Research-only static analysis. Not investment advice. This tool does not fetch live data, connect to brokers, place orders, recommend buys, sells, holds, target allocations, or trades, predict returns, or produce personalized financial advice.

checks.name: missing_required_file
checks.resolution: Run from the repository root or pass --root with a directory containing the documented static files.
checks.symptom: A command exits with a file-not-found error.

checks.name: fixture_quality_blocker
checks.resolution: Fix missing columns, unsupported event types, invalid confidence values, stale dates, or advice-like terms in the static CSV.

checks.name: public_readiness_blocker
checks.resolution: Review the blockers list, regenerate missing demo artifacts, and keep README finance boundaries explicit.

checks.name: manifest_drift
checks.resolution: Regenerate changed demo artifacts, then run release-manifest followed by diff-check.

checks.name: operator_docs_missing
checks.resolution: Run docs-export, readme-snippet, cli-help, and command-matrix from the repository root.
checks.symptom: An evaluator cannot find command usage or docs surfaces.

title: Operator Troubleshooting Guide
